name: TRIFLUOPERAZINE
melting_point_raw: Cream-colored, fine powder from absolute alcohol; MP: 242-243 °C; pH of 5% aq soln= 2.2, Hygroscopic /Dihydrochloride/

name: DOFETILIDE
melting_point_raw: 147-149 °C ... from hexane/ethyl acetate, mp 151-152 °C ... also reported as white crystalline solid, mp 161 °C

name: VENLAFAXINE
melting_point_raw: Crystals from ethyl acetate; melting point 102-104 °C; specific optical rotation: +27.6 deg (c = 1.07 in 95% ethanol) /Venlafaxine (+)form/

name: MEMANTINE
melting_point_raw: White to off white fine powder. Crystals from alcohol/ether. MP: 290-295 °C, also reported as 290-295 °C. Soluble in water. /Memantine hydrochloride/

name: REMIFENTANIL
melting_point_raw: Crystals from methanol + ether. MP: 212-214 °C /Remifentanil hydrochloride/

name: FLUORESCEIN

name: SODIUM PHOSPHATE, DIBASIC, ANHYDROUS

name: TUBOCURARINE

name: NITROGEN

name: SODIUM BENZOATE

boiling_point_raw: >450 °C to <475 °C, decomposes with no boiling (OECD Guideline 103 (Boiling point/boiling range))

name: SODIUM CARBONATE
